name: Festive Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the nut meats and brown sugar together and set aside.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining ingredients (flour, white sugar, baking soda, salt, and fruit cocktail).
3. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch x 9-inch pan.
4. Sprinkle the top with the mixture of brown sugar and nut meats.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
6. Serve topped with whipped cream or ice cream.
